Scheme.Description: should make comparison with called xslt function
Scheme.Template: <xsl:stylesheet xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform"> <xsl:template match="/page/n"> <xsl:template name="test"> <xsl:variable name="bytes" select="248"/> <xsl:if test="format-number($bytes div 1024, '0') = 0">1</xsl:if> </xsl:template> </xsl:template> </xsl:stylesheet>
